```{r}
# Load packages
library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(patchwork)
library(skimr)
library(ggpubr)
library(gtsummary)
library(dendextend)
```

```{r}
snp_cols <- data_clean %>%
  select(starts_with("c_")) %>%
  colnames()

perforin_cols <- data_labelled %>%
  select(`Perforin Expression %`) %>%
  colnames()
```

```{r}
# Perforin expression by patient group
ggplot(data_labelled, aes(diagnosis_group, `Perforin Expression %`,
                          fill = diagnosis_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.6, colour = "black") +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 2, alpha = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("HLH", "Non-HLH"),
                       c("HLH", "Unknown"),
                       c("Non-HLH", "Unknown")),
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif",
    tip.length = 0.1,
    size = 4,
    vjust = 2) +
  stat_summary(
    fun.data = function(x) data.frame(y = -5, label = paste0("n = ", length(x))),
    geom = "text",
    size = 3) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-10, 115)) +
  labs(y = "Perforin Expression (%)", x = "Diagnosis",
       title = "Perforin Expression by Diagnosis Group") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10))
        )
```

```{r}
# Create matrix of SNPs
snp_matrix <- data_labelled %>%
  select(all_of(snp_cols)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Check which SNPs have zero variance
zero_var <- sapply(snp_matrix, var, na.rm = TRUE)
names(zero_var[zero_var == 0])

# Remove the zero-variance SNPs
snp_matrix_clean <- snp_matrix[, zero_var > 0]

# Run PCA
pca_snp <- prcomp(snp_matrix_clean, scale. = TRUE, center = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# Create matrix of perforin expression
perforin_matrix <- data_labelled %>%
  select(all_of(perforin_cols)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Check which expression has zero variance
zero_var_perf <- sapply(perforin_matrix, var, na.rm = TRUE)

# Remove
perforin_clean <- perforin_matrix[, zero_var_perf > 0]

# Scale
perforin_scaled <- scale(perforin_clean)

# Scale
snp_scaled <- scale(snp_matrix_clean)

# Combine into one matrix
combined <- cbind(snp_scaled, perforin_scaled)

# Run PCA on the combined matrix
pca_combined <- prcomp(combined, scale. = FALSE, center = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Scree plot of just SNP matrix
p_scree <- fviz_eig(
  pca_snp,
  addlabels = TRUE,
  ylim       = c(0, 20),
  main       = "SNP alone",
  barcolor   = "black")

plot(p_scree)
```

```{r}
# Scree plot of the combined matrix
scree_combined <- fviz_eig(
  pca_combined,
  addlabels = TRUE,
  ylim       = c(0, 20),
  main       = "SNP + Perforin",
  barfill    = "#2166AC",
  barcolor   = "black")

plot(scree_combined)
```

```{r}
# Plot both 
p_scree + scree_combined +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A",
                  title = "Scree Plot: Variance explained per PC (SNP alone vs Combined)")
```

```{r}
p_pca <- fviz_pca_ind(
  pca_snp,
  geom.ind   = "point",
  col.ind    = data_labelled$diagnosis_group,
  palette    = c("#B2182B", "#2166AC", "#808080"),
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.type = "confidence",
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  legend.title = "Diagnosis",
  pointsize    = 2,
  title        = "PCA of SNPs by diagnosis") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

plot(p_pca)
```

```{r}
combined_pca <- fviz_pca_ind(
  pca_combined,
  geom.ind   = "point",
  col.ind    = data_labelled$diagnosis_group,
  palette    = c("#B2182B", "#2166AC", "#808080"),
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.type = "confidence",
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  legend.title = "Diagnosis",
  pointsize    = 2,
  title        = "PCA by diagnosis (Combined)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

plot(combined_pca)
```

```{r}
p_pca + combined_pca +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A",
                  title = "PCA comparison: SNPs alone vs SNPs + Perforin expression")
```

```{r}
# How does each SNP contribute to variation?
p_contrib <- fviz_contrib(
  pca_snp,
  choice   = "var",
  axes     = 1:2,
  top      = 15,
  fill     = "#F4A582",
  color    = "black",
  title    = "SNP contributions to PC1 & PC2")

plot(p_contrib)
```

```{r}
contrib_combined <- fviz_contrib(
  pca_combined,
  choice   = "var",
  axes     = 1:2,
  top      = 15,
  fill     = "#F4A582",
  color    = "black",
  title    = "Contributions to PC1 & PC2 (Combined)")

plot(contrib_combined)
```

```{r}
p_contrib + contrib_combined +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A",
                  title = "Contributions to PC1 & PC2: SNPs alone vs SNP + Perforin expression")
```

```{r}
loadings_df <- as.data.frame(pca_snp$rotation[, 1:2]) %>%
  rownames_to_column("snp") %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(PC1)))

loadings_snp <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(snp, PC1), y = PC1)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2166AC") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "SNP Loadings on PC1",
    x = "SNP",
    y = "Loading"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

plot(loadings_snp)
```

```{r}
loadings_combined <- as.data.frame(pca_combined$rotation[, 1:2]) %>%
  rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(PC1)))

loadings_combined <- ggplot(loadings_combined, aes(x = reorder(feature, PC1), y = PC1)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = feature == "perforin_scaled"), show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#D73027", "FALSE" = "#2166AC")) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Feature Loadings on PC1 (SNPs + Perforin)",
    x = "Feature",
    y = "Loading"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

plot(loadings_combined)
```

```{r}
loadings_snp + loadings_combined +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A",
                  title = "Feature loadings on PC1: SNPs alone vs SNP + Perforin expression")
```

```{r}
# Create heatmap matrix
heatmap_matrix <- t(snp_matrix_clean)

# Set patient IDs as column names
colnames(heatmap_matrix) <- as.character(data_labelled$`Patient ID`)

# Ensure row names and column names match
col_annotation <- data.frame(
  Diagnosis = data_labelled$diagnosis_group,
  row.names = as.character(data_labelled$`Patient ID`)
)

# Choose colours for annotation
# Annotation colours
ann_colours <- list(
  Diagnosis = c("HLH" = "#B2182B", "Non-HLH" = "#2166AC", "Unknown" = "#808080")
)

# Plot the heatmap
pheatmap(
  heatmap_matrix,
  annotation_col     = col_annotation,
  annotation_colors  = ann_colours,
  clustering_method   = "ward.D2",
  cluster_rows        = TRUE,
  cluster_cols        = FALSE,
  color              = colorRampPalette(c("#4575B4", "#ABD9E9", "#D73027"))(3),
  breaks             = c(-0.5, 0.5, 1.5, 2.5),
  legend_breaks      = c(0, 1, 2),
  legend_labels      = c("0", "1", "2"),
  fontsize_row       = 8,
  fontsize_col       = 6,
  show_colnames      = FALSE,
  main               = "SNP Genotype Heatmap by Diagnosis",
  border_color       = NA        
  )
```
